newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The Q1 2026 results (Apr 29; sales -8%, EPS $0.89), the MoistureShield (~$56M) and Berry Pallets acquisitions, and the +3% dividend all predate June 9. The +2.1% move is sub-threshold sector drift.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node screen: no new evidence on the modular-industrial/packaging pathway since June 9. The packaging/composite-decking and pallet expansion is real but ordinary construction-materials capacity, not AI-supply-chain. Under-owned, -7.5% YTD setup unchanged.
verdicts.bull: Packaging + composites + pallet network could quietly serve modular industrial/datacenter logistics build-out; decking output doubling by 2027.
verdicts.neutral: Solid materials franchise but only a latent/tangential AI tie; weak residential demand caps near-term.
verdicts.bear: Cyclical construction exposure (Q1 sales -8%) with no concrete AI-infrastructure linkage.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Residential-construction softness and no real AI-supply-chain pull.
